message:
feat(supervision): add launchd supervisor detection and actions (macOS)

Add support for macOS launchd service manager in the supervision detection
and action execution subsystems:

Supervisor Detection (environ.rs):
- Add XPC_SERVICE_NAME environment variable detection for XPC services
- Add __CFBundleIdentifier detection for app bundles launched by launchd
- Add LAUNCH_DAEMON detection for explicit launchd daemons
- All patterns use SupervisorCategory::Orchestrator with high confidence

Action Execution (supervisor.rs):
- Add SupervisorType::Launchd enum variant
- Add launchd_label and launchd_domain to SupervisorParameters
- Implement build_launchd_command with modern launchctl domain-based commands:
  - bootout for stop/delete (stops and unloads service)
  - kickstart -k for restart (kills and restarts)
  - kill KILL for force kill
- Support domain targets: system, gui/<uid>, user/<uid>
- Add detect_launchd_respawn using launchctl list parsing

Unit Tests:
- Add tests for XPC_SERVICE_NAME and __CFBundleIdentifier detection
- Add tests for launchd command generation (stop, restart, kill)
- Add test for default system domain fallback
- Add test for SupervisorParameters launchd fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
